KATELYN C. THOMPSON
Contact
Public Policy
Strategic Communications

Turning
ideas into
action.

A Tennessee policy and communications
leader who turns complex challenges into
people-centered solutions.

A Memphis native shaping Tennessee's civic landscape.

Katelyn pairs strategic acumen with compassionate leadership and a relentless commitment to equity. A Tennessee State University alum, she holds dual degrees in criminal justice and psychology and a Master of Public Administration, credentials she uses to translate policy into tangible benefits for all Tennesseans.

Off and on the floor, she's the Policy Fashionista — a lifelong love of fashion she carries into every room, because showing up polished and showing up prepared have never been in competition.

Substance with sophistication.

The same discipline that shapes a legislative strategy shows up in how she shows up — never off duty, always intentional.

“In rooms where leadership has long had a familiar look, I choose to show up as myself. Confident. Prepared. Unapologetically polished. I believe style and substance belong in the same conversation because leadership is not only demonstrated through what you do, but also through the standards you set for yourself.”

— Katelyn Thompson

Strategy and communications for mission-driven leaders.

Advisory support for campaigns, public agencies, and organizations working to expand opportunity and engage their communities.

State GovernmentPolicy Director, TN Senate Democratic Caucus
Municipal GovernmentExecutive Communications, Mayor Paul A. Young
CampaignsCampaign Manager, Sen. London Lamar

Let's build something durable.
